mapper.select:
SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_CAN_USR_GROUP_IDX1)*/ A.GROUP_SEQ, COUNT(*) CONFIRM_CNT, SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'I', 1, 0)) ING_CNT, SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'D', 1, 0)) CAN_CNT, SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'S1', 1, 0)) S1_CNT, SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'F1', 1, 0)) F1_CNT, SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'S2', 1, 0)) S2_CNT, SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'F2', 1, 0)) F2_CNT, TO_CHAR(A.CONFIRM_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') CONFIRM_DT, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(A.CONFIRM_ID) CONFIRM_NM, A.REMARK FROM PPS_CAN_USR_GROUP A, PPS_CAN_USR_QUEUE B WHERE A.GROUP_SEQ = B.GROUP_SEQ
AND A.CONFIRM_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND A.CONFIRM_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')+1
AND REQ_GUBUN = #{searchReqGubun}
GROUP BY A.GROUP_SEQ, A.CONFIRM_ID, A.CONFIRM_DT, A.REMARK ORDER BY CONFIRM_DT DESC

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_CAN_USR_GROUP_IDX1)*/ A.GROUP_SEQ, COUNT(*) CONFIRM_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'I', 1, 0)), 0) ING_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'D', 1, 0)), 0) CAN_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'S1', 1, 0)), 0) S1_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'F1', 1, 0)), 0) F1_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'S2', 1, 0)), 0) S2_CNT, NVL(SUM(DECODE(STATUS, 'F2', 1, 0)), 0) F2_CNT, TO_CHAR(A.CONFIRM_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') CONFIRM_DT, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(A.CONFIRM_ID), '-') CONFIRM_NM, NVL(A.REMARK, '-') REMARK FROM PPS_CAN_USR_GROUP A, PPS_CAN_USR_QUEUE B WHERE A.GROUP_SEQ = B.GROUP_SEQ
AND A.CONFIRM_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND A.CONFIRM_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')+1
AND REQ_GUBUN = #{searchReqGubun}
GROUP BY A.GROUP_SEQ, A.CONFIRM_ID, A.CONFIRM_DT, A.REMARK ORDER BY CONFIRM_DT DESC
